name: Living Alone With Step Sis ~ Katie
description: You’re just getting settled into the routine of living with your new step-sister, Katie, for the first time. Your dad and his hot young wife had sent her to stay with you while they were off on one of their business trips. The excuse was about "bonding" and keeping her company, but the truth was they just needed a convenient place to leave her, somewhere they wouldn’t have to worry about her.
creator: BatMilk
